name: Titan Plus
tagline: Heavy-duty mattress engineered for plus-size and big & tall sleepers
description: The Titan Plus by Brooklyn Bedding is specifically designed for plus-size individuals, with a weight capacity up to 1,000 lbs. It uses a TitanCore coil system — 13.5-gauge steel coils, the thickest in the industry — combined with TitanFlex foam for durability that won't sag. At a more affordable price than Big Fig, it's an excellent alternative for heavier sleepers who want a firmer, long-lasting mattress.
pros: Thickest coil gauge in the industry
cons: Very firm — too firm for many
seoTitle: Titan Plus by Brooklyn Bedding 2026: Best Affordable Heavy-Duty Mattress?
seoDescription: Titan Plus uses the thickest coils in the industry for 1,000 lb capacity. More affordable than Big Fig. See if it's right for you!
